entries.expected_output: Python is a programming language used for web development, data science, and automation.

context_documents.text: Python is a high-level programming language. It is used for web development, data science, artificial intelligence, and automation.

entries.input: When was the Eiffel Tower built?
entries.expected_output: The Eiffel Tower was built in 1889.

context_documents.text: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris. It was constructed from 1887 to 1889 as the centerpiece of the 1889 World's Fair.
